posts.author: vikas_chandrawat
posts.community: Safe Enterprises Retail Fixtures Limited: Positioning at the Intersection of India’s Retail Growth Story
posts.text: Thanks for covering this Shiva, especially the concall notes. I am really liking this business. I came across it a few weeks ago and this is my kinda business: great roce, 0 debt, promoter led and expanding capacity with secular tail-winds as india’s organized ratail infrastructure. I have a few concerns and I would love to hear your views on the same: My biggest worry and concern is the single client concentration of 80%+ . Any slowdown in stores expansion from Trent, business suffers greatly. And given the position, buyer can easily put pressure on margins either via pricing negotiations or…
